HomePage.title: Strategy, systems, and trade-offs
HomePage.subtitle: Notes on enterprise architecture, cloud adoption, and engineering leadership. Personal opinions, not an employer voice.

BlogPage.title: Blog
BlogPage.description: Articles on architecture decisions, platforms, and delivery.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.body: I write about enterprise architecture, cloud platforms, open source operations, and how teams align technology with business outcomes. Content here reflects my own views unless stated otherwise.
highlights: 20+ years across architecture, cloud, platform engineering, and delivery.
Led regional architecture strategy and governance across multi-country operations.
Scaled cloud adoption from 1% to 37% by establishing cloud-first and API-first defaults.
Built engineering quality and automation capabilities with measurable delivery impact.

timeline.title: Enterprise Architecture Manager
timeline.summary: Leading regional enterprise architecture strategy across financial services, commerce, customer, and store platforms.

timeline.title: DevOps Engineer
timeline.summary: Delivered DevOps/SRE improvements for healthcare and e-commerce clients on AWS, with IaC and CI/CD acceleration.

timeline.title: Linux and Cloud Engineer
timeline.summary: Supported enterprise retail operations, automating Linux/cloud provisioning and reducing deployment lead time.

timeline.title: Solution Architect (Co-Founder)
timeline.summary: Led cloud and platform modernization projects, including API centralization and infrastructure migration.

timeline.title: Solution Architect (Freelance)
timeline.summary: Designed and implemented architecture and automation solutions for multiple organizations.

timeline.title: Solution Architect
timeline.summary: Delivered open-source migration and enterprise integration initiatives across public and private sectors.

timeline.title: Web Programmer
timeline.summary: Built and maintained web solutions, combining backend and infrastructure-focused execution.

timeline.title: System Administrator
timeline.summary: Early operations foundation in system administration, network services, and platform reliability.

projects.title: Regional cloud modernization
projects.summary: Scaled cloud adoption from 1% to 37% while institutionalizing cloud-native and API-first patterns across domains.

projects.title: Software Quality Engineering function
projects.summary: Established regional quality governance and automation-first practices, increasing test automation coverage from 0% to 24%.

projects.title: IaC + CI/CD acceleration
projects.summary: Designed Terraform/CloudFormation workflows and delivery pipelines for faster, repeatable, and safer releases.

projects.title: VM provisioning automation
projects.summary: Reduced infrastructure provisioning from about one week to under two hours through end-to-end automation.

projects.title: REST platform centralization
projects.summary: Consolidated reusable business services into API platforms, reducing maintenance complexity and time-to-change.

projects.title: Cloud migration and on-demand environments
projects.summary: Led migrations from on-prem/VPS to AWS and implemented Azure-based on-demand development and test environments.

projects.title: Open-source and enterprise migrations
projects.summary: Delivered large migration programs across infrastructure, identity, and core platform services with continuity focus.
